name: A & D JAMAICAN RESTAURANT

violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Walls and ceiling in stove area need cleaned.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Wet cloths sitting on counter.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Repaint front counter. -Remove foil from surfaces in kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean walls and ceiling in grill area.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)

source_address: 710 N LACROSSE ST STE 4, Rapid City
